task_completion.description: Log in to the GeoServer web admin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the GeoServer web admin interface at localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ with the user logged in as 'admin' (typically indicated by a 'Welcome admin' message or logout button).

task_completion.description: Open the settings for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer interface showing the 'Edit Layer' page specifically for the 'ne_populated_places' layer.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Publishing tab for the layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publishing' tab is active/selected on the Edit Layer page.
Under the KML Format Settings section, the 'Regionating Attribute' dropdown or text field is set to 'pop_max'.
Under the KML Format Settings section, the 'Regionating Strategy' dropdown is set to 'external-sorting'.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the Edit Layer page, or a subsequent screenshot shows the Layers list with a green success message indicating the layer was saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GeoServer web GUI via a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the GeoServer UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface displays standard GeoServer styling, menus, and layout, rather than a local HTML mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and being used to alter the DOM text to simulate the correct attribute or strategy.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target workspace is 'ne' and the layer is 'ne_populated_places'. The correct KML regionation strategy to select is 'external-sorting'. The correct regionation attribute to select is 'pop_max'.
